themes: Discovering that what others see as a flaw may be what makes someone special
projects.progress_notes: Currently being queried to literary agents and seeking traditional publishing.
projects.title: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower
projects.short_description: A heartfelt picture book about Dan, a young Whisperer who is mocked for his giant ears — until a devastating flood threatens his forest community.
projects.long_description: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower is a heartfelt picture book about Dan, a young Whisperer who is mocked for his giant ears. When a devastating flood threatens his forest community, Dan must learn to believe in himself and use the very thing everyone laughed at to save them.
projects.disclaimer: Visual artwork shown here is inspiration only. Final illustration direction may be guided by a future publisher.

projects.progress_notes: In active development. Working title and further details to come.
projects.title: The Fang: Unlocking the Blood of the Beast
projects.short_description: A dark fantasy vampire story involving ancient power, blood abilities, moral conflict, and a young woman named Aria who must discover what she is capable of becoming.
projects.long_description: A dark fantasy vampire story involving ancient power, blood abilities, moral conflict, and a young woman named Aria who must discover what she is capable of becoming.
